mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_price (trade_date, market_name, item_name, item_code, kind_name, grade_name, unit_qty, avg_price, prev_avg_price, prev_year_price, fluctuation_rate, raw_json) VALUES
(#{p.tradeDate}, #{p.marketName}, #{p.itemName}, #{p.itemCode}, #{p.kindName}, #{p.gradeName}, #{p.unitQty}, #{p.avgPrice}, #{p.prevAvgPrice}, #{p.prevYearPrice}, #{p.fluctuationRate}, #{p.rawJson})
INSERT INTO market_report (report_date, summary, pdf_path) VALUES (#{reportDate}, #{summary}, #{pdfPath})
